selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 格洛斯特（英国西南部的港市）；格洛斯特硬干酪（产于英国）
words.definition: n. a town in northeastern Massachusetts on Cape Ann to the northeast of Boston; the harbor has been a fishing center for centuries

words.translation: n. 顶, 尖端, 梢, 末端, 倾斜, 垃圾场, 小费, 轻击, 指点, 秘密消息；vt. 装顶端, 使倾斜, 使翻倒, 泄露, 告诫, 暗示, 给...小费, 轻击
words.definition: n. the extreme end of something; especially something pointed

words.translation: n. 一扭, 扭曲, 曲折, 歪曲, 螺旋状, 新手法；vt. 拧, 扭, 捻, 编织, 使扭转, 缠绕, 盘绕, 歪曲, 使转动, 使苦恼, 使混乱, 使旋转
words.definition: n. a jerky pulling movement

words.translation: n. 丝, 绸, 绸锻类, 丝织品；a. 丝的, 丝织的
words.definition: n. a fabric made from the fine threads produced by certain insect larvae

words.translation: a. 有色的, 有...色的, 经过渲染的, 有色彩的, 伪装的, 有色人种的, 混血种的；n. 有色人种的人, 混血人
n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 轻打, 水龙头；vt. 轻打, 轻敲, 敲打出, 选择, 装上嘴子, 使流出, 开发, 分接, 向...乞讨
words.definition: n. a small metal plate that attaches to the toe or heel of a shoe (as in tap dancing)

words.translation: n. 外套；vt. 外面覆盖, 给...穿外套
words.definition: n. an outer garment that has sleeves and covers the body from shoulder down; worn outdoors

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶
words.definition: n. a beverage made by steeping tea leaves in water

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 钮扣, 按钮；vi. 扣住
words.definition: n. a round fastener sewn to shirts and coats etc to fit through buttonholes

words.translation: n. 雪, 积雪, 下雪, 雪花形干扰；vi. 下雪, 似雪般落下
words.definition: n. precipitation falling from clouds in the form of ice crystals

words.translation: n. 商店, 工厂, 车间；vi. 购物, 到处寻找
words.definition: n. a mercantile establishment for the retail sale of goods or services

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 圣诞节
words.definition: n. period extending from Dec. 24 to Jan. 6

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: n. 厨房, 全套炊具
words.definition: n. a room equipped for preparing meals

words.translation: n. 桌子, 餐桌, 工作台, 铭文, 表格, 表, 高原, 平地层；vt. 搁置, 嵌合, 制表, 把...列入议事日程
words.definition: n. a set of data arranged in rows and columns

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: vt. 除, 除外；vi. 反对
n. 疾病, 坏事, 罪恶, 灾难；a. 生病的, 邪恶的, 不吉利的, 敌意的, 不良的, 不顺利的
adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 杯子, 茶杯, 优胜杯；vt. 使成杯状, 为...拔火罐
words.definition: n. a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: a. 单身的, 单程的, 单一的, 个别的, 孤独的, 专一的；n. 一个, 单打, 单程票
words.definition: a. used of flowers having usually only one row or whorl of petals

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的
words.definition: n. money extracted as a penalty

words.translation: num. 二十, 二十个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of nineteen and one

words.translation: n. 学院, 大学, 学会
words.definition: n. the body of faculty and students of a college

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: a. 近的, 近亲的, 近似的；adv. 接近, 亲近
words.definition: a. not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances

words.translation: n. 纸, 文件, 文章, 报纸, 证券, 证件；vt. 用纸糊, 贴壁纸于, 用纸包装
words.definition: n. a material made of cellulose pulp derived mainly from wood or rags or certain grasses

words.translation: n. 市长
words.definition: n. the head of a city government

words.translation: a. 木制的, 呆笨的, 木然的
words.definition: s. made or consisting of (entirely or in part) or employing wood

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
n. 光, 光亮, 灯, 日光, 发光体, 光源, 杰出人物, 火花, 眼光；a. 轻的, 少量的, 轻微的, 轻快的, 轻浮的, 明亮的, 淡色的, 容易的
words.definition: n. (physics) electromagnetic radiation that can produce a visual sensation

words.translation: n. 奶, 乳状物；vt. 挤乳, 榨取
words.definition: n. a white nutritious liquid secreted by mammals and used as food by human beings

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: a. acting or moving or capable of acting or moving quickly

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 钥匙, 键, 解答, 关键, 要害, 基调, 线索, 答案, 暗礁；vt. 调音, 锁上, 提供线索
words.definition: n. metal device shaped in such a way that when it is inserted into the appropriate lock the lock's mechanism can be rotated

words.translation: a. 富裕的, 富饶的, 浓厚的, 贵重的
words.definition: a. possessing material wealth

words.translation: vt. 可作...用, 服务, 经历, 招待, 供应, 送交, 对待；vi. 服务, 服役, 侍应, 适合, 有用, 开球
words.definition: v. serve a purpose, role, or function

words.translation: a. 奇怪的, 陌生的, 生疏的, 不熟悉的, 不可思议的, 外行的, 外地的, 异乡的
words.definition: a. being definitely out of the ordinary and unexpected; slightly odd or even a bit weird

words.translation: a. 能干的, 能够的
words.definition: a. (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: n. 答案, 回答, 回报, 答辩；vt. 回答, 反驳, 适应, 响应, 符合
words.definition: n. a statement (either spoken or written) that is made to reply to a question or request or criticism or accusation

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚

words.translation: vt. 遗失, 损失, 丢失, 使失去, 错过, 浪费, 迷失, 使迷路, 输去, 使沉溺于；vi. 受损失, 失败

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的

words.translation: adv. 宁可, 稍微, 相当
words.definition: r. on the contrary; rather (or instead), he wrote her a letter"

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的

words.translation: n. 站立, 站住, 停顿, 讲台, 看台, 立场, 法院证人席；vi. 站, 立, 坐落, 停滞, 位于, 坚持, 维持原状

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 呼喊, 喊声；vi. 呼喊, 喊叫, 嚷

words.translation: n. 模范, 典型, 式样, 样品, 图案, 格调, 模式；vt. 模仿, 仿造, 以图案装饰

words.translation: num. 十二, 十二个

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地

words.translation: a. 美丽的

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
n. 衣服
n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.definition: a. high in price or charging high prices

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的

words.translation: n. 地板, 楼层, 底部, 底价；vt. 铺地板, 打倒
words.definition: n. the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇

words.translation: n. 标志, 分数, 马克, 痕迹, 斑点, 靶子, 刻度, 记号, 符号, 戳记, 标准, 起跑线；vt. 做标记于, 留意, 打分数, 表明, 标志, 记录

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个

words.translation: n. 注意, 布告, 通知, 预告, 短评；vt. 注意, 通知, 评论, 提及, 关注
words.definition: n. an announcement containing information about an event

words.translation: n. 次序, 规则, 命令；vi. 命令, 定货
words.definition: n. (often plural) a command given by a superior (e.g., a military or law enforcement officer) that must be obeyed

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的

words.translation: n. 秘密, 机密, 秘诀, 秘方；a. 秘密的, 极机密的, 隐蔽的, 暗中的, 神秘的, 偏僻的

words.translation: n. 形状, 形态, 外形, 形式, 身材；vt. 定形, 使成形, 塑造, 计划, 使符合

words.translation: n. 触觉, 碰, 触, 机灵, 轻触, 格调, 少许, 缺点, 弹力；vt. 接触, 触摸, 触及, 使接触, 达到, 涉及, 影响到, 使轻度受害, 感动

words.translation: n. 星期二

words.translation: n. 浪费, 废物, 损耗, 消耗, 荒地, 垃圾, 地面风化物；a. 废弃的, 荒芜的, 多余的
words.definition: n. any materials unused and rejected as worthless or unwanted

words.translation: n. 穿着, 戴, 使用, 耗损, 服装, 耐久性；vt. 穿着, 戴, 留(须、发等), 呈现, 磨损, 磨成, 耗损, 使疲乏, 消磨

words.translation: n. 奇迹, 惊奇, 惊愕；vt. 惊奇, 想知道

words.translation: n. 咬, 一口；v. 咬, 刺痛, 穿透

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的

words.translation: n. 十字架, 十字架形物件, 交叉, 十字标, 交叉路, 磨难, 杂交；a. 生气的, 交叉的, 相反的
